description: Fired when a new user completes sign-up and their org/account is provisioned. Top of the conversion funnel.
Fired when a student enrolls in an academy. Key activation event indicating learner intent.
Fired when a student starts a diagnostic session to assess their existing knowledge.
Fired when a student retrieves their diagnostic result, indicating the session is done.
Fired when a student starts a lesson for a concept. Indicates active learning engagement.
Fired when a student completes a lesson. Key activation/retention signal.
Fired when a student completes a quiz. Measures ongoing knowledge assessment engagement.
Fired when a student starts a section exam. Indicates readiness to demonstrate mastery.
Fired when a student completes a section exam. Key mastery and course completion signal.
Fired when an org admin initiates a billing checkout session. Top of payment funnel.
Fired via Stripe webhook when a checkout session completes and a subscription is created.
Fired via Stripe webhook when a subscription is deleted. Key churn signal.
